name: Yii2 PHP & MySQL (Fix)
postCreateCommand: sudo rm -f /etc/apt/sources.list.d/yarn.list && sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y default-mysql-server && sudo service mysql start && mysql -u root -e "CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS db_pubman; CREATE USER IF NOT EXISTS 'pubman_app'@'localhost' IDENTIFIED BY 'pubmanapp'; GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON db_pubman.* TO 'pubman_app'@'localhost'; FLUSH PRIVILEGES;" && mysql -u root db_pubman < schema.sql
